name: flarepilled
description: Don't build what Cloudflare already runs. A code-review lens for the Cloudflare platform.

plugins.name: flarepilled
plugins.description: Scans code for hand-rolled infra Cloudflare offers as a managed primitive, and surfaces honest, confidence-rated swaps grounded in live Cloudflare docs — 124 products across 12 categories, incl. the Zero Trust/SASE stack and the Rules family.
